prediction.reasoning: Based on typical stock volatility patterns, ETN shows moderate price movements. Using historical volatility estimates for similar stocks (~15-20% annualized), I applied a 7-day forecast with expected slight upward drift (+0.67%) and standard deviation of ~2.8%. The confidence intervals reflect increasing uncertainty ranges: 50% CI spans ±1.8%, 80% CI spans ±3.6%, and 90% CI spans ±4.9% around the point estimate.
